meta.title: Node Schema
meta.description: Self-describing declaration for a node in the distributed Athena superbrain.

required_fields.role: enum: unified | lobe | docs | git | incubator | governance
required_fields.lobe_affinity: str | null — S, F, C, R, or null for universal
required_fields.mirrors: list[str] — node_ids this node mirrors with
required_fields.cert_capabilities: list[str] — what this node can certify (STRUCTURAL, CONSERVATION, etc.)
